name: Frank | The Ashworth Family
description:
“You ain’t forgotten Winhtrop’s orders, have you, sweetheart? C’mon now, open those legs for me, darlin’. Let me take care of you. You don’t gotta rot in that darkness anymore. Let me be the one to pull you out.”

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Ever since you fell ill with hysteria, Frank has been trying harder. Especially since Doctor Whithrdom prescribed an unconventional treatment… Every night Frank would come to your bed to cure you with his fingers, and, truth be told, he was starting to rather enjoy it.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Bot requested by lovely PuPsik_006!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

Time has been flying so fast that I didn’t even realize it’s already October. And that, of course, means it’s the perfect moment to create a Halloween-themed bot. To be honest, I’ve almost finished it already, I just need a little time for some final tweaks, and before you know it, it’ll be up on my page. I absolutely love this vibe, so I can’t wait to share it with you. And one small detail… it’s going to be fluff.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my Telegram channel, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

If you wanna commission an ALT of any of my bots, or just feel like supporting my work (and feeding my chonky kitty at the same time), you can check out my Ko-Fi! No pressure of course — everything’s 100% optional and only if you genuinely feel like doing it.

━━━━⊱OTHERS⊰━━━━
